tools.name: describe_share_html
tools.description: Return the AI-readable Share HTML guide, including routes and safety model.

tools.name: get_public_share
tools.description: Fetch public metadata for a Share HTML slug.

tools.name: create_share
tools.description: Publish one HTML page as either an unlisted or access-key protected sandboxed share.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_public_share · Public sink: describe_share_html, get_public_share, create_share.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_public_share · Public sink: describe_share_html, get_public_share, create_share

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
